Class DatabaseHelper

java.lang.Object
persistence.DatabaseHelper
public class DatabaseHelper extends Object
Singleton data-access object that manages all SQLite database operations for the Mizan budget application.

The single shared Connection is opened on first access and reused for the lifetime of the application. Tables are created automatically on first run via initializeTables().

Usage:

    DatabaseHelper db = DatabaseHelper.getInstance();
    db.insertExpense(expense);

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private Connection
    connection
    Active SQLite connection used for all queries.
    private static final String
    CREATE_BUDGET_CYCLE_TABLE
    DDL statement that creates the budget_cycle table if absent.
    private static final String
    CREATE_CATEGORY_TABLE
    DDL statement that creates the category table if absent.
    private static final String
    CREATE_EXPENSE_TABLE
    DDL statement that creates the expense table if absent.
    private static DatabaseHelper
    instance
    The sole instance of this class (Singleton pattern).

    Permanently deletes a category record from the database.

  • Field Details

    • instance

      private static DatabaseHelper instance
      The sole instance of this class (Singleton pattern).

    • connection

      private Connection connection
      Active SQLite connection used for all queries.

    • CREATE_BUDGET_CYCLE_TABLE

      private static final String CREATE_BUDGET_CYCLE_TABLE
      DDL statement that creates the budget_cycle table if absent.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • CREATE_CATEGORY_TABLE

      private static final String CREATE_CATEGORY_TABLE
      DDL statement that creates the category table if absent.
      See Also:

      private static final String CREATE_EXPENSE_TABLE
      DDL statement that creates the expense table if absent.

  • Constructor Details

    • DatabaseHelper

      private DatabaseHelper()
      Private constructor — opens the SQLite connection and creates tables. Use getInstance() to obtain the shared instance.

  • Method Details

    • initializeTables

      private void initializeTables()
      Creates all required tables if they do not already exist. Called once during construction.

    • getInstance

      public static DatabaseHelper getInstance()
      Returns the singleton instance, creating it on first call.
      Returns:
      the shared DatabaseHelper instance

    • insertCycle

      public long insertCycle(BudgetCycle budgetCycle)
      Inserts a new budget cycle record into the database.
      Parameters:
      budgetCycle - the cycle to persist (ID field is ignored)
      Returns:
      the generated database ID, or -1 on failure

    • getBudgetCycle

      public BudgetCycle getBudgetCycle()
      Retrieves the first budget cycle found in the database.
      Returns:
      a populated BudgetCycle, or null if none exists

    • updateCycleStatus

      public void updateCycleStatus(int id, CycleStatus status)
      Updates the status column of a budget cycle row.
      Parameters:
      id - database ID of the cycle to update
      status - new CycleStatus value

    • deleteCycle

      public void deleteCycle(int id)
      Permanently deletes a budget cycle and its row from the database.
      Parameters:
      id - database ID of the cycle to delete

    • insertExpense

      public long insertExpense(Expense expense)
      Inserts a new expense record into the database.
      Parameters:
      expense - the expense to persist (ID field is ignored)
      Returns:
      the generated database ID, or -1 on failure

    • updateExpense

      public void updateExpense(Expense expense)
      Updates the amount and category of an existing expense record.
      Parameters:
      expense - expense object carrying the new values; its id must match an existing database row

    • deleteExpense

      public void deleteExpense(int id)
      Permanently deletes an expense record from the database.
      Parameters:
      id - database ID of the expense to delete

    • getAllExpenses

      public List<Expense> getAllExpenses(int cycleId)
      Returns all expenses belonging to a specific budget cycle.
      Parameters:
      cycleId - the cycle to query
      Returns:
      list of Expense objects; empty list if none found

    • getExpensesByCategory

      public List<Expense> getExpensesByCategory(int cycleId, int categoryId)
      Returns all expenses for a specific category within a budget cycle.
      Parameters:
      cycleId - the cycle to query
      categoryId - the category to filter by
      Returns:
      filtered list of Expense objects

    • getTodaySpent

      public double getTodaySpent(int cycleId)
      Returns the sum of all expense amounts for today within a cycle. Matches rows whose timestamp starts with today's date string.
      Parameters:
      cycleId - the cycle to query
      Returns:
      total amount spent today in EGP, or 0 if none

    • getTotalSpent

      public double getTotalSpent(int cycleId)
      Returns the cumulative total of all expenses in a cycle.
      Parameters:
      cycleId - the cycle to query
      Returns:
      total spent in EGP, or -1 on query failure

    • insertCategory

      public long insertCategory(Category category)
      Inserts a new category record into the database.
      Parameters:
      category - the category to persist (ID field is ignored)
      Returns:
      the generated database ID, or -1 on failure

    • getAllCategories

      public List<Category> getAllCategories()
      Returns all categories stored in the database.
      Returns:
      list of all Category objects; empty list if none found

    • deleteCategory

      public void deleteCategory(int id)
      Permanently deletes a category record from the database.
      Parameters:
      id - database ID of the category to delete

    • savePin

      public void savePin(String hashedPin)
      Persists a hashed PIN, replacing any previously stored value. Creates the pin table automatically if it does not exist.
      Parameters:
      hashedPin - SHA-256 hex digest of the user's PIN

    • getPin

      public String getPin()
      Retrieves the stored hashed PIN from the database. Creates the pin table automatically if it does not exist.
      Returns:
      the stored SHA-256 hex digest, or null if no PIN is set
